changelog: Inline chat strips reordered: 📋 Plan (top) → ▶ Next (middle) → 🔁 Repeat (bottom, closest to the chat box). The action buttons stay right-aligned in a consistent vertical stack, matching the natural workflow (plan first, queue next steps, then repeat-loop).
Root readme.md install snippets and pinned-version badges bumped from v4.0.0 to v4.2.0.
Version pins synced to 4.2.0 across manifest, constants, every standalone-script instruction.ts, shared-state, payment-banner-hider, and the prompts bundle metadata.
